 {"id":"brenner_bot-d4p","title":"Feature: Search UI/UX","description":"Build the search user interface with world-class UX.

## Rationale

Search UX is critical — it's the primary way users will find specific content in the corpus. Must feel instant, intuitive, and helpful.

## Design Goals

### Visual Design
- Clean, minimal search modal (similar to Linear, Raycast, Notion)
- Keyboard-first but touch-friendly
- Results clearly show document type, section, and context
- Highlighted match terms

### Interaction Patterns

**Trigger Search**
- Keyboard: ⌘K / Ctrl+K (integrate with existing Command Palette)
- Click: Search icon in header
- Mobile: Search button in bottom nav or dedicated search page

**Search Flow**
1. Open search → focus on input
2. Type → results appear instantly (debounced)
3. Navigate results with arrow keys or tap
4. Select result → navigate to that location
5. Matched term scrolled into view and highlighted

**Result Display**
- Document title and type badge
- Section title (if applicable)
- Context snippet with highlighted matches
- Read time / word count indicator

### Scope Filter
- Toggle: 'All Documents' vs 'Transcripts Only'
- Remember user's preference
- Clear indication of current scope

## Integration Points

- Extend existing Command Palette component OR
- Build dedicated search modal
- Add to existing header nav
- Mobile: accessible from bottom nav

## Deliverables

- Search modal/overlay component
- Result list with highlighting
- Scope filter toggle
- Keyboard navigation
- Mobile-optimized search experience

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Search opens via ⌘K and click
- [ ] Results appear within 200ms of typing
- [ ] Can navigate results with keyboard
- [ ] Matches highlighted in results
- [ ] Works well on mobile (touch targets, readable)
- [ ] Scope filter remembers preference","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:27:11.027347548-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T00:05:51.444651886-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T00:05:51.444651886-05:00","close_reason":"All acceptance criteria met: SpotlightSearch has ⌘K + click triggers, 150ms debounce, keyboard navigation, result highlighting, mobile support. All 4 subtasks closed.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-d4p","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-cxl","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:27:23.885758333-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-d4p","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-gnj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:27:25.091958437-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}

 {"id":"brenner_bot-dfg","title":"Create spacing and shadow system tokens","description":"# Task

Define spacing scale and shadow system for consistent visual hierarchy.

# Spacing (8px base unit)

Standard increments: 0.25rem, 0.5rem, 0.75rem, 1rem, 1.25rem, 1.5rem, 2rem, 3rem, 4rem, 6rem, 8rem

Fluid section spacing:
```css
--section-y: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 6rem);
--section-y-lg: clamp(4rem, 8vw, 8rem);
--container-x: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 2rem);
```

# Shadow System

## Elevation shadows
- `--shadow-xs`: Subtle lift (buttons)
- `--shadow-sm`: Light elevation (cards)
- `--shadow-md`: Medium elevation (dropdowns)
- `--shadow-lg`: Heavy elevation (modals)
- `--shadow-xl`: Maximum elevation (popovers)

## Glow shadows (for accent elements)
- `--shadow-glow-primary`: Cyan glow for primary buttons
- `--shadow-glow-amber`: Amber glow for accents

```css
--shadow-glow-primary: 0 4px 20px oklch(0.75 0.18 195 / 0.35);
```

# Implementation

1. Define all tokens in globals.css
2. Create Tailwind utilities or extend theme
3. Apply to shadcn components

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Spacing tokens defined and usable
- [ ] Shadow tokens with both elevation and glow variants
- [ ] Cards and buttons use appropriate shadows
- [ ] Hover states include subtle glow effects","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:13:22.848379063-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T19:37:54.927130727-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T19:37:54.927130727-05:00","close_reason":"Spacing and shadow tokens complete: fluid section spacing, 5 elevation shadows, 2 glow effects, build verified","labels":["design-system","spacing","ux","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-dfg","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-7yz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:13:46.326640517-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-dfg","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-1qx","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:21:59.451348526-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}
-{"id":"brenner_bot-dg28","title":"FEATURE: Notification System - Alerts for Deadlines & Agent Results","description":"
## Keep Users Engaged Across Async Work

Research doesn't happen in one sitting. Users set up predictions, await evidence, dispatch agents. They need to know when things happen.

### Notification Types

1. **Agent Completion**
   - "Devil's Advocate has reviewed your hypothesis"
   - "Experiment Designer suggests 3 test modifications"
   - Link to view agent response

2. **Prediction Deadline**
   - "Your prediction for [X] expires in 24 hours"
   - "Lock your prediction or extend the deadline"
   - Gentle nudge to keep moving

3. **Evidence Ready**
   - "Evidence recorded for [prediction]"
   - "View how your prediction compared to outcome"
   - Prompt to update confidence

4. **Session Inactive**
   - "You haven't worked on [hypothesis] in 7 days"
   - "Resume or mark as dormant?"
   - Prevent abandonment

5. **Milestone Reached**
   - "Congratulations! First hypothesis falsified"
   - "Your calibration improved by 10%"
   - Celebrate learning moments

### Delivery Channels
- **In-app**: Badge on session, notification center
- **Browser**: Push notifications (if permitted)
- **Email**: Digest of recent activity (opt-in)

### User Preferences
- Which notifications to receive
- How often (real-time, daily digest, never)
- Do not disturb hours

### Implementation
- Notification queue in session state
- Notification component in layout
- Service worker for push (optional)
- LocalStorage for unread tracking

### Depends On
- reew.1 (Session Dashboard Layout)

 {"id":"brenner_bot-dj4","title":"Feature: Mobile Performance Optimization","description":"Ensure mobile performance meets world-class standards.

## Rationale

Performance IS UX on mobile. Slow load times, janky scrolling, or layout shifts destroy the feeling of quality regardless of visual design.

Target: Lighthouse mobile score > 95

## Key Areas

### Initial Load
- First Contentful Paint (FCP) < 1.5s
- Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) < 2.5s
- Time to Interactive (TTI) < 3.5s
- Total Blocking Time (TBT) < 200ms

### Runtime Performance
- Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) = 0
- 60fps scrolling
- Instant interaction response
- Smooth animations

### Asset Optimization
- Images: srcset for responsive sizes, lazy loading
- Fonts: preload critical fonts, use font-display: swap
- CSS: Critical CSS inlined, rest deferred
- JS: Code splitting, lazy load non-critical

## Current State Assessment

Need to run Lighthouse to establish baseline. Suspected areas:
- Large transcript content (40k+ words in one page)
- Animation library size
- Font loading

## Deliverables

- Lighthouse baseline report
- Identified performance issues
- Implemented fixes for critical issues
- Final Lighthouse report showing improvement

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Lighthouse mobile performance > 95
- [ ] CLS = 0 on all pages
- [ ] FCP < 1.5s on 4G connection
- [ ] No jank during scroll (verified in DevTools)
- [ ] Images lazy-loaded and responsive","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:26:34.763065039-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T02:24:58.616577934-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T02:24:58.616577934-05:00","close_reason":"Mobile scroll is working (commit 8036000). Performance optimization (Lighthouse score 80, needs >95) split to brenner_bot-s8x due to implementation challenges with lazy loading.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-dj4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-ldh","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:27:23.824131613-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-dj4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-3vw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:27:25.06217521-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}

All child tasks complete.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-djz","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-o7a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:10:03.919846074-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-dko","title":"Task: Fix critical mobile layout issues","description":"Fix P0/P1 issues identified in the mobile audit.

## Purpose

Address blocking issues before polish work. These are problems that make the app feel broken.

## Typical P0/P1 Issues

- Horizontal overflow (content wider than viewport)
- Touch targets below 44px minimum
- Critical text unreadable
- Navigation broken or unusable
- Safe area violations causing content to be hidden

## Approach

1. Work through issues in priority order
2. Fix one issue at a time
3. Re-screenshot to verify fix
4. Test on actual mobile device if possible

## Files Likely to Touch

- apps/web/src/app/globals.css (spacing, typography)
- apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx (layout structure)
- Component files for specific issues
- Tailwind config if breakpoint changes needed

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All P0 issues resolved
- [ ] All P1 issues resolved
- [ ] Re-screenshots confirm fixes
- [ ] No regressions on desktop
- [ ] Build passes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:28:00.984396449-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T02:13:38.989795942-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T02:13:38.989795942-05:00","close_reason":"All critical mobile issues resolved. Audit found only 1 P1 issue (horizontal overflow) which was fixed with overflow-x:hidden on html/body. All P2 checks passed (touch targets, overflow on all pages). Build verified.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-dko","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-3vw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:28:36.583403387-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-dko","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-z9y","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:28:36.67889406-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}
